## Working session summary

Implemented and pushed the fix.

- Default disk threshold is now `0.65` for both config paths.
- Existing tests updated for the 65% threshold/display.
- Issue/PR data captured under `dev/log/issues/2045/pulls/2046/`.
- Focused regression tests pass.
- PR is ready: [#2046](https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/2046)

Full lint/default suite could not run locally because the workspace uses Node 20 while the project requires Node 24+.

---

## Working session summary

Resolved and finalized [PR #2046](https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/2046).

- Added the required patch changeset, fixing the failed CI gate.
- Updated the missed limits-display assertion from 80% to 65%.
- Updated PR title and description.
- Pushed commits to the prepared branch.
- Fresh CI passes fully under Node 24.
- PR is ready for review, mergeable, and reports `CLEAN`.
- Working tree is clean.
